OBJECT Page 347 Report Selection - Purchase
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=07/27/23;
    Time=[ 9:49:13 AM];
    Modified=Yes;
    Version List=NAVW1.x,N.7.2.1,DC;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Report Selection - Purchase;
    SaveValues=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table77;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    PageType=Worksheet;
    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 SetUsageFilter;
               END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  NewRecord;
                END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=BEGIN
                           // Start PA039784.54256
                           RefreshButtons();
                           // Stop PA039784.54256
                         END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1109400001;  ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 1109400002;1 ;Action    ;
                      Name=List Overview;
                      CaptionML=ENU=List Overview;
                      Description=PA039784.54256;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=List;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 RepSelectionL@1109400000 : Record 77;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start PA039784.54256
                                 RepSelectionL.FILTERGROUP(2);
                                 CASE ReportUsage2 OF
                                   ReportUsage2::Inquiry:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Inquiry");
                                   ReportUsage2::Order:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Order");
                                   ReportUsage2::Invoice:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Inv.");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Credit Memo":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Cr.Memo");
                                   ReportUsage2::Receipt:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Receipt");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Purchase Document - Test":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Test");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Return Order":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Ret.Order");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Return Shipment":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment");
                                 END;
                                 RepSelectionL.FILTERGROUP(0);
                                 RepSelectionL.SETCURRENTKEY(Usage,"Location Code","Make Code",Sequence);
                                 IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, RepSelectionL) <> ACTION::LookupOK THEN
                                   EXIT;
                                 MakeUsageG := RepSelectionL."Make Code";
                                 LocationUsageG := RepSelectionL."Location Code";
                                 SetUsageFilter();
                                 CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);

                                 // Stop PA039784.54256
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400004;1 ;Action    ;
                      Name=Previous;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Previous;
                      Description=PA039784.54256;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Enabled=BackEnabledG;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=PreviousRecord;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA039784.54256
                                 GroupRecordStep(-1);
                                 // Stop PA039784.54256
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400005;1 ;Action    ;
                      Name=Next;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Next;
                      Description=PA039784.54256;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Enabled=NextEnabledG;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=NextRecord;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start PA039784.54256
                                 GroupRecordStep(1);
                                 // Stop PA039784.54256
                               END;
                                }
    }
  }
  CONTROLS
  {
    { 1900000001;0;Container;
                ContainerType=ContentArea }

    { 11  ;1   ;Field     ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Usage;
                OptionCaptionML=ENU=Inquiry,,Order,Invoice,Credit Memo,Receipt,Purchase Document - Test,Return Order,Return Shipment,Return Order Picklist,ADR Document,,,,,Direct Cr. EDI File,Direct Cr. Remittance Advice,Direct Cr. Schedule;
                Description=PA041199.68194,EU.0074599,DC;
                SourceExpr=ReportUsage2;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             SetUsageFilter;
                             ReportUsage2OnAfterValidate;
                             // Start PA039784.54256
                             RefreshButtons();
                             // Stop PA039784.54256
                           END;
                            }

    { 1109400000;1;Field  ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Make Code;
                SourceExpr=MakeUsageG;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             SetUsageFilter;
                             MakeUsageGOnAfterValidate;
                             // Start PA039784.54256
                             RefreshButtons();
                             // Stop PA039784.54256
                           END;

                OnLookup=VAR
                           MakecodeL@1109400000 : Record 5028656;
                         BEGIN
                           // Start INC
                           IF NOT MakecodeL.GET(Text) THEN
                             CLEAR(MakecodeL);
                           IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0,MakecodeL) = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
                             Text := MakecodeL."Make Code";
                             EXIT(TRUE);
                           END ELSE
                             EXIT(FALSE);
                           // Stop INC
                         END;
                          }

    { 1109400003;1;Field  ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Location Code;
                SourceExpr=LocationUsageG;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start INC
                             SetUsageFilter;
                             // Stop INC
                             LocationUsageGOnAfterValidate;
                             // Start PA039784.54256
                             RefreshButtons();
                             // Stop PA039784.54256
                           END;

                OnLookup=VAR
                           MakecodeL@1109400000 : Record 5028656;
                           LocationCodeL@1109400003 : Record 14;
                         BEGIN
                           // Start INC
                           IF NOT LocationCodeL.GET(Text) THEN
                             CLEAR(LocationCodeL);
                           IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0,LocationCodeL) = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
                             Text := LocationCodeL.Code;
                             EXIT(TRUE);
                           END ELSE
                             EXIT(FALSE);
                           // Stop INC
                         END;
                          }

    { 1   ;1   ;Group     ;
                GroupType=Repeater }

    { 2   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr=Sequence }

    { 9   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Report ID";
                LookupPageID=Objects;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA036461.27591
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA036461.27591
                           END;
                            }

    { 4   ;2   ;Field     ;
                DrillDown=No;
                SourceExpr="Report Caption" }

    { 13  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Print Sent-From Line";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA036461.27591
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA036461.27591
                           END;
                            }

    { 15  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Print Address Block";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA036461.27591
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA036461.27591
                           END;
                            }

    { 1101267193;2;Field  ;
                SourceExpr="Print Comp. Business Template";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA035484.20754
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA035484.20754
                           END;
                            }

    { 1119432006;2;Field  ;
                Description=PA033052;
                SourceExpr="Print Report Title";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA036461.27591
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA036461.27591
                           END;
                            }

    { 1119432008;2;Field  ;
                Description=PA033052;
                SourceExpr="Report Title";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA036461.27591
                             CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
                             // Stop PA036461.27591
                           END;
                            }

    { 10136100;2;Field    ;
                SourceExpr="Custom Report Layout Code";
                Visible=FALSE }

    { 10136101;2;Field    ;
                SourceExpr="Use for Email Attachment" }

    { 10136102;2;Field    ;
                SourceExpr="Use for Email Body" }

    { 10136103;2;Field    ;
                SourceExpr="Email Body Layout Code";
                Visible=FALSE }

    { 10136104;2;Field    ;
                SourceExpr="Email Body Layout Description" }

    { 1900000007;0;Container;
                ContainerType=FactBoxArea }

    { 1900383207;1;Part   ;
                Visible=FALSE;
                PartType=System;
                SystemPartID=RecordLinks }

    { 1905767507;1;Part   ;
                Visible=FALSE;
                PartType=System;
                SystemPartID=Notes }

  }
  CODE
  {
    VAR
      ReportUsage2@1109400000 : 'Inquiry,,Order,Invoice,Credit Memo,Receipt,Purchase Document - Test,Return Order,Return Shipment,Return Order Picklist,ADR Document,,,,,Direct Cr. EDI File,Direct Cr. Remittance Advice,Direct Cr. Schedule';
      _INCADEA_@1109400001 : Boolean;
      MakeUsageG@1109400002 : Code[20];
      LocationUsageG@1109400003 : Code[20];
      NextEnabledG@1109400004 : Boolean INDATASET;
      BackEnabledG@1109400005 : Boolean INDATASET;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE SetUsageFilter@1();
    BEGIN
      FILTERGROUP(2);
      CASE ReportUsage2 OF
        ReportUsage2::Inquiry:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Inquiry");
        ReportUsage2::Order:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Order");
        ReportUsage2::Invoice:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Inv.");
        ReportUsage2::"Credit Memo":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Cr.Memo");
        ReportUsage2::Receipt:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Receipt");
        ReportUsage2::"Purchase Document - Test":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Test");
      // Start INC
        ReportUsage2::"Return Order":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Ret.Order");

        ReportUsage2::"Return Shipment":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment");
      // Start PA041199.68194
        ReportUsage2::"Return Order Picklist":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick");
      // Stop PA041199.68194
      // Start EU.0074599
        ReportUsage2::"ADR Document":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"ADR Document");
      // Stop EU.0074599

      // Start DC6.00
        ReportUsage2::"Direct Cr. EDI File":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Direct Cr. EDI File");
        ReportUsage2::"Direct Cr. Remittance Advice":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Direct Cr. Remittance");
        ReportUsage2::"Direct Cr. Schedule":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Direct Cr. Schedule");
      // Stop DC6.00
      END;

      SETRANGE("Make Code",MakeUsageG);

      SETRANGE("Location Code", LocationUsageG);
      //Stop INC
      FILTERGROUP(0);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReportUsage2OnAfterValidate@19038799();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE MakeUsageGOnAfterValidate@19064971();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE LocationUsageGOnAfterValidate@19067914();
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GroupRecordStep@1109400001(StepP@1109400003 : Integer);
    VAR
      InDifferentGroupL@1109400000 : Boolean;
      RepSelectionL@1109400002 : Record 77;
    BEGIN
      // @ GroupRecordStep - Used when pushing next or previous button to show the next
      // @ or previous group of records that have the same usage, location code and make code.
      // @ param stepP - Integer

      // Start PA039784.54256
      RepSelectionL := Rec;
      RepSelectionL.SETCURRENTKEY(Usage,"Location Code","Make Code",Sequence);
      // Start PA041199.68194
      RepSelectionL.SETFILTER(Usage,'%1|%2|%3|%4|%5|%6|%7|%8|%9',Usage::"P.Inquiry",Usage::"P.Order",
        Usage::"P.Inv.",Usage::"P.Cr.Memo",Usage::"P.Receipt",Usage::"P.Test",Usage::"P.Ret.Order",Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment",Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick");
      // Stop PA041199.68194
      REPEAT
        RepSelectionL.NEXT(StepP);
        InDifferentGroupL := NOT InTheSameGroup(RepSelectionL,Rec);
      UNTIL InDifferentGroupL;
      SetReportUsage2(RepSelectionL);
      MakeUsageG := RepSelectionL."Make Code";
      LocationUsageG := RepSelectionL."Location Code";
      SetUsageFilter();
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE RefreshButtons@1109400002();
    VAR
      FirstRepSelectionL@1109400000 : Record 77;
      LastRepSelectionL@1109400001 : Record 77;
      RepSelectionL@1109400002 : Record 77;
    BEGIN
      // @ RefreshButtons - Used to Refresh the next, previous buttons

      // Start PA039784.54256
      BackEnabledG := FALSE;
      NextEnabledG := FALSE;
      RepSelectionL := Rec;
      RepSelectionL.SETCURRENTKEY(Usage,"Location Code","Make Code",Sequence);
      // Start PA041199.68194
      RepSelectionL.SETFILTER(Usage,'%1|%2|%3|%4|%5|%6|%7|%8|%9',Usage::"P.Inquiry",Usage::"P.Order",
        Usage::"P.Inv.",Usage::"P.Cr.Memo",Usage::"P.Receipt",Usage::"P.Test",Usage::"P.Ret.Order",Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment",Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick");
      // Start PA041199.68194
      FirstRepSelectionL.SETVIEW(RepSelectionL.GETVIEW);
      LastRepSelectionL.SETVIEW(RepSelectionL.GETVIEW);
      IF FirstRepSelectionL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        LastRepSelectionL.FINDLAST;
        BackEnabledG := PreviousGroupExists(FirstRepSelectionL);
        NextEnabledG := NextGroupExists(LastRepSelectionL);
      END;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE InTheSameGroup@1109400003(RepSelection1P@1109400000 : Record 77;RepSelection2P@1109400001 : Record 77) InTheSameGroupR : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ InTheSameGroup - Used to check if 2 records have the same Usage, Make Code and Location Code
      // @ param RepSelection1P - Record Report Selection
      // @ param RepSelection2P - Record Report Selection
      // @ retval InTheSameGroupR - Boolean

      // Start PA039784.54256
      InTheSameGroupR:= (RepSelection1P.Usage = RepSelection2P.Usage) AND
        (RepSelection1P."Make Code" = RepSelection2P."Make Code") AND
        (RepSelection1P."Location Code" = RepSelection2P."Location Code") ;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE PreviousGroupExists@1109400004(RepSelectionP@1109400000 : Record 77) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ PreviousGroupExists - Used to check if a previous group of records exists
      // @ param RepSelectionP - Record Report Selection
      // @ retval - Boolean

      // Start PA039784.54256
      IF (Usage < RepSelectionP.Usage) THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF Usage > RepSelectionP.Usage THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Location Code" < RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Location Code" > RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Make Code" < RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Make Code" > RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NextGroupExists@1109400005(RepSelectionP@1109400000 : Record 77) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ NextGroupExists - Used to check if a next group of records exists
      // @ param RepSelectionP - Record Report Selection
      // @ retval - Boolean

      // Start PA039784.54256
      IF (Usage >  RepSelectionP.Usage) THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF Usage < RepSelectionP.Usage THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Location Code" > RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Location Code" < RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Make Code" > RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Make Code" < RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE SetReportUsage2@1109400007(RepSelectionP@1109400000 : Record 77);
    BEGIN
      // @ SetReportUsage2 - Used to map the records usage with the option ReportUsage2
      // @ param RepSelectionP - Record Report Selection

      // Start PA039784.54256
      CASE RepSelectionP.Usage OF
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Inquiry":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Inquiry;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Order":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Order;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Inv.":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Invoice;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Cr.Memo":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Credit Memo";
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Receipt":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Receipt;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Test":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Purchase Document - Test";
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Ret.Order":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Return Order";
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Return Shipment";
        // Start PA041199.68194
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Return Order Picklist";
        // Start PA041199.68194
      END;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area Parts
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA033052   23.05.11 PR Added new controls 'Report Title', 'Print Report Title', 'Print Add. Footer', 'Print Make Logo', 'Print Company Logo'.
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea style guide
      PA033336   17.10.12 SS 8746211 Removed "Print Footer Line" field control.
      PA033336   12.11.12 SS 8590628 Removed logo fields: "Print Company Logo", "Print Make Logo"
      PA035484   04.04.14 GF 20754 Renamed field "Print Add. Footer" to "Print Comp. Business Template"
      PA036461   01.09.14 KK 27591 Changed behavior of saving selected reports
      PA036547   06.11.14 GE Merge N.6.1.4 to N.7.1.0 - PA035484.20754.
      PA036548   22.12.14 GL Adjusted Source expressions of fields with changed names
      PA039931   28.01.16 GE Extend all make code variables to code20
      PA039932   02.02.16 GE Merge of PA039931
      PA039784   15.03.16 GW 54256 New GroupRecordStep, RefreshButtons, InTheSameGroup, PreviousGroupExists, NextGroupExists,
                             SetReportUsage2 functions to enable Next and Previous button functionality to browse
                             in the Setup Records. New List Overview button to show the Setup Records for a specific Usage.
      PA041199   10.08.16 SA 68194  Added code for option "Return Order Picklist" in ReportUsage2.
      EU.0074599 23.08.19 GD 74602 New optionstring value: "ADR Document" for Usage.
      EU.0070929 04.09.19 GD Downmerge of EU.0074599 to 7.2.0.
      --- 7.2.1 ---
      EU.0101361 09.07.20 KR NAV BC Technical Upgrade
      DC14.0     27.07.23 QQ Direct Credits NZ - Added DC usage options.
    }
    END.
  }
}
